heading: Payment of allowances, etc., incident to change of station of Engineer officers from appropriation for improvements
label: 583 Payment of allowances, etc., incident to change of station of Engineer officers from appropriation for improvements
text: When in the opinion of the Secretary of the Army the changes of a station of an officer of the Corps of Engineers is primarily in the interest of river and harbor improvement, the mileage and other allowances to which he may be entitled incident to such change of station may be paid from appropriations for such improvements.
notes: Change of NameDepartment of War designated Department of the Army and title of Secretary of War changed to Secretary of the Army by section 205(a) of , . Section 205(a) of act , was repealed by section 53 of , .
